name: frontend-dev
description: Essential skills for frontend development: UI design, UX review, QA testing, browsing, and code review.
author: ASM

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Design and implement production-grade frontend components and UI pages

skills.name: dont-make-me-think
skills.description: Review UI for usability issues using Don't Make Me Think principles

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Systematically QA test a web application

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Review code changes for bugs, security issues, and best practices
